context.audience: Developers building multi-language web applications, European companies targeting multiple EU markets, SaaS teams expanding to international audiences
pain_points: Implementing hreflang tags correctly across many language and region combinations
URL structure decisions between subdomains, subdirectories, and ccTLDs
Translating and localizing content with AI while maintaining SEO quality
Managing duplicate content across language versions of the same page
Geo-targeting and CDN configuration for international audiences
